---
title: "Mergin Maps Admin Essentials"
subtitle: "Exercise: Dashboard introduction"
author: "Ryan Aherin"
date: "2024-03-05"
format:
  pdf: 
    toc: false
---


{{< pagebreak >}}


# Mergin Maps Dashboard

In this exercise, we will give an overview of the Merign Maps Dashboard. If you are using the SaaS
version of Mergin Maps, you can reach the dashboard at <https://app.merginmaps.com/>. If you are
on a custom or self-hosted server, you will have your own link to reach the dashboard. 

If you need to refer to an overview of the dashboard at a later time, you can find the latest information
in our [Documentation](https://merginmaps.com/docs/manage/dashboard/#mergin-maps-dashboard).
